title: Coperium Enhanced
description: An optimal modpack that optmizes minecraft with the help of optimal mods mods.
body:
---

## **Coperium – Lightweight Optimization Modpack**

**Coperium** is a versatile Fabric modpack that dramatically improves Minecraft performance while maintaining visual clarity and gameplay responsiveness. Designed for both client and server environments across Minecraft **1.21.x**, this pack uses some of the best performance mods available. 

### **Core Mods and Features**

Coperium loads a curated set of mods that work together to reduce lag, optimize rendering, and enhance both singleplayer and multiplayer performance:

**Rendering & FPS Enhancers**

* **Sodium & Sodium Extra** — Advanced rendering engine for better frame rates. 
* **Iris Shaders** — Optional shader support with performance-minded integration. 
* **BetterGrassify** — Improved grass rendering with minimal performance impact. 

**Game Logic & Optimization**

* **Lithium** — Improves core game logic performance. 
* **FerriteCore** — Reduces memory usage and load spikes. 
* **ImmediatelyFast** — Speeds up vanilla actions and reduces delays.

**Chunk & Rendering Efficiency**

* **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine** — Multi-threaded chunk loading for less stutter. 
* **More Culling & Entity Culling** — Avoids rendering objects you can’t see. 

**Multiplayer & Network**

* **Fast IP Ping** — Improves server connection times. 
* **Ksyxis** & **XXL Packets** — Optimized network handling for smoother online play. 

**Technical & Stability Mods**

* **Alternate Current** — More efficient redstone handling. 
* **BadOptimizations** — Fixes poorly performing vanilla mechanics. 

### **Why Coperium?**

* **Balanced optimization for all players** — Whether you’re on low or high-end hardware. 
* **Client & server support** — Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer. 
* **Performance without trade-offs** — Keeps gameplay smooth while preserving visuals. 

**Coperium** is ideal for players and servers who want **performance, reliability, and quality** without bloated mod counts.
